title: Calgara Draws His Spear
description: Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Musse, Shandia villager, Shandia warrior. Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: Heeeyyyyyyyyy! Give us some change of clothes!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Ughh, what a turn of events...

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: We're all gonna die tomorrow night.

dialogue.speaker: Shandia villager
dialogue.text: Have some more tact, you idiots...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: He explores unknown lands in this world,

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Well, when push comes to shove,

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: We will see for certain tomorrow.

summary: Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.
